[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#get-account-id)

Get Account Id


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Get an account ID given a secret passphrase or public key.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-post)

Method: POST

Copy

    https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=getAccountId

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-body-x-www-form-urlencoded)

Example body (**x-www-form-urlencoded**)

Copy

    requestType = setPhasingOnlyControl
    secretPhrase = IWontTellYou

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-12)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "privateKey": "a89faa1b56e384762195f3c2094a15fa394e12186630f720b0473d0637c69054",
        "accountRS": "ARDOR-L6FM-89WK-VK8P-FCRBB",
        "publicKey": "57fb6f3a958e320bb49c4e81b4c2cf28b9f25d086c143b473beec228f79ff93c",
        "requestProcessingTime": 1,
        "account": "15323192282528158131"
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#get-effective-balance)

Get Effective Balance


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Get the balance of an account in ARDR.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-get-23)

Method: GET

Copy

    https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=getEffectiveBalance&account=7114946486381367146

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-24)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "forgedBalanceFQT": "37669839331",
        "guaranteedBalanceFQT": "42537785269331",
        "effectiveBalanceFXT": 425377,
        "requestProcessingTime": 2
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#get-funding-monitor)

Get Funding Monitor


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Get a funding monitor. The monitors for a single funding account will be returned when the secret phrase is specified. A single monitor will be returned if holding and property are specified. Otherwise, all monitors for the funding account will be returned The administrator password is not required and will be ignored. When the administrator password is specified, all monitors will be returned unless the funding account is also specified. A single monitor will be returned if holding and property are specified. Otherwise, all monitors for the funding account will be returned. Holding type codes are listed in getConstants. In addition, the holding identifier must be specified when the holding type is ASSET or CURRENCY.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-get-24)

Method: GET

Copy

    https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=getFundingMonitor&property=funding&secretPhrase=IWontTellYou&includeMonitoredAccounts=true&holding=5

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-25)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "requestProcessingTime": 23,
        "monitors": []
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#get-guaranteed-balance)

Get Guaranteed Balance


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Get the balance of an account in ARDR. This is the minimum balance the account had in the interval:

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-get-25)

Method: GET

Copy

    https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=getGuaranteedBalance&account=7114946486381367146&numberOfConfirmations=1440

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-26)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "guaranteedBalanceNQT": "42537785269331",
        "requestProcessingTime": 6
    }

Method: GET

Copy

        "requestProcessingTime": 8,
        "transactions": []
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#rs-convert)

RS Convert


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Get both the Reed-Solomon account address and the account number given an account ID.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-get-30)

Method: GET

Copy

    https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=rsConvert&account=ARDOR-L6FM-89WK-VK8P-FCRBB

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-31)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "accountRS": "ARDOR-L6FM-89WK-VK8P-FCRBB",
        "accountLongId": "-3123551791181393485",
        "requestProcessingTime": 0,
        "account": "15323192282528158131"
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#search-accounts)

Search Accounts


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Get accounts having a name or description that match a given query in reverse relevance order.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-get-31)

Method: GET

Copy

    https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=searchAccounts&query=testnet AND tyler

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-32)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "accounts": [],
        "requestProcessingTime": 324
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#send-money)

Send Money


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Send chain tokens to an account.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-post-1)

Method: POST

> Copy
> 
>     https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=sendMoney

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-body-x-www-form-urlencoded-1)

Example body (**x-www-form-urlencoded**)

Copy

    requestType = sendMoney
    secretPhrase = IWontTellYou
    chain = 2
    recipient = ARDOR-4VNQ-RWZC-4WWQ-GVM8S
    amountNQT = 100000000
    feeNQT = 1000000
    deadline = 60

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-33)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "amount": "100000000",
        "chain": 2,
        "errorDescription": "Not enough funds",
        "balance": "0",
        "fee": "1000000",
        "errorCode": 6,
        "diff": "101000000"
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#set-account-info)

Set Account Info


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Set account information.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-post-2)

Method: POST

> Copy
> 
>     https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=setAccountInfo

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-body-x-www-form-urlencoded-2)

Example body (**x-www-form-urlencoded**)

Copy

    requestType = setAccountInfo
    secretPhrase = IWontTellYou
    chain = 2
    name = iwonttellyou
    description = example account
    feeNQT = 1000000
    deadline = 60

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-34)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "amount": "0",
        "chain": 2,
        "errorDescription": "Not enough funds",
        "balance": "0",
        "fee": "100000000",
        "errorCode": 6,
        "diff": "100000000"
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#set-account-property)

Set Account Property


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Set account property.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-post-3)

Method: POST

> Copy
> 
>     https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=setAccountProperty

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-body-x-www-form-urlencoded-3)

Example body (**x-www-form-urlencoded**)

Copy

    requestType = setAccountProperty
    secretPhrase = IWontTellYou
    chain = 2
    property = country
    value = switzerland
    feeNQT = 1000000
    deadline = 60

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-35)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "errorDescription": "Unknown account",
        "errorCode": 5
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#delete-account-property)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-post-4)

Method: POST

> Copy
> 
>     https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=deleteAccountProperty

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-body-x-www-form-urlencoded-4)

    secretPhrase = IWontTellYou
    chain = 2

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-36)

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#delete-contract-reference)

Delete Contract Reference


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Deletes a contract reference for a specific account (the contract itself is not deleted)

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-post-5)

Method: POST

> Copy
> 
>     https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=deleteContractReference

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-body-x-www-form-urlencoded-5)

Example body (**x-www-form-urlencoded**)

Copy

    requestType = deleteContractReference
    secretPhrase = IWontTellYou
    chain = 2
    contractName = HelloWorld
    property = testkey1
    feeNQT = -1
    feeRateNQTPerFXT = -1

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-37)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "errorDescription": "Unknown account",
        "errorCode": 5
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#set-contract-reference)

Set Contract Reference


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Sets a contract reference for a specific account.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-post-6)

Method: POST

> Copy
> 
>     https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=setContractReference

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-body-x-www-form-urlencoded-6)

Example body (**x-www-form-urlencoded**)

Copy

    requestType = setContractReference
    secretPhrase = IWontTellYou
    chain = 2
    contractName = HelloWorld
    contract = 2:98ad60e6fc95e794216fc49a62e7f0ba2f37e2aed62dd3598c804d7a71ca2b32
    feeNQT = -1
    feeRateNQTPerFXT = -1

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-38)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "errorDescription": "Unknown account",
        "errorCode": 5
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#start-funding-monitor)

Start Funding Monitor


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Starts a funding monitor that will transfer ARDR, ASSET, CURRENCY or child chain tokens (ie: IGNIS) from the funding account to a recipient account when the amount held by the recipient account drops below the threshold. The transfer will not be done until the current block height is greater than equal to the block height of the last transfer plus the interval. The funding account is identified by the secret phrase.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-post-7)

Method: POST

> Copy
> 
>     https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=startFundingMonitor

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-body-x-www-form-urlencoded-7)

Example body (**x-www-form-urlencoded**)

Copy

    requestType = startFundingMonitor
    secretPhrase = IWontTellYou
    chain = 5
    property = funding
    amount = 1000000000
    threshold = 15000000000
    interval = 10
    holding = 5
    feeRateNQTPerFXT = 1000000

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-39)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "errorDescription": "Unknown account",
        "errorCode": 5
    }

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#stop-funding-monitor)

**Stop Funding Monitor**


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Stop a funding monitor. When the secret phrase is specified, a single monitor will be stopped. The monitor is identified by the secret phrase, holding and account property. The administrator password is not required and will be ignored.

When the administrator password is specified, a single monitor can be stopped by specifying the funding account, holding and account property. If no account is specified, all monitors will be stopped.

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#method-post-8)

Method: POST

> Copy
> 
>     https://ardr.nownodes.io/nxt?requestType=stopFundingMonitor

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-body-x-www-form-urlencoded-8)

Example body (**x-www-form-urlencoded**)

Copy

    requestType = stopFundingMonitor
    secretPhrase = IWontTellYou
    chain = 2
    property = funding
    holding = 5

#### 

[](https://nownodes.gitbook.io/ardr-ardor/ardor-ardr/accounts#example-response-200-40)

Example response: 200

Copy

    {
        "stopped": 0,
        "requestProcessingTime": 3
    }
